name: Codex CLI
project_binding_recipe: Bind the repo once, then explicitly expose each existing vault item the repo needs. HASP may create neutral aliases internally, but day-to-day agent use should prefer named refs like @OPENAI_API_KEY.
approval_path: Prefer the wrapper or launcher path, then let hasp mcp auto-open the daemon-backed session and use project/session or window grants; hasp session grant-plaintext is the operator path when plaintext is explicitly required.
safe_inject_path: Use hasp_run / hasp_inject over stdio for command and file-based secret needs, preferably with named refs like @OPENAI_API_KEY instead of recalling secret_01 or revealing plaintext.
write_env_path: Use hasp write-env for explicit convenience materialization only.
